pull-request-header:
### Automated Release Process

New commits conforming to the [Conventional Commits specification](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/) have been registered since the preceding release.

The following changelog details the specific modifications applied to the codebase:
pull-request-footer:
### Validation Required

If the current changes are approved for publication, please authorize this request by squashing and merging this pull request. Consequently, a draft release will be created and a NixOS-WSL image will be built, attached to the release, and finally the release will be published.
